headlines.title: What Amazon saw in Fauna Robotics’ humanoid strategy
headlines.summary: Amazon did not acquire Fauna to ship a consumer humanoid. Sprout will not be walking around your living room folding laundry anytime soon.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle humanoid, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Amazon CEO says robotics is key for faster delivery, lower costs
headlines.summary: Amazon now has over 1 million robots operating in fulfillment centers, helping with stowing, picking, sorting, and intra-facility transport.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.

headlines.title: Robotics Summit rolls out limited time National Robotics Week discount
headlines.summary: To celebrate National Robotics Week, for a limited time, attendees can save on Full Conference Passes for the Robotics Summit & Expo.

headlines.title: OLogic to share the keys to balancing hardware and software at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: With real-world examples, the founder of OLogic will offer a roadmap for building robots that don't just work in the lab.

political_items.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
political_items.summary: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

political_items.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
political_items.summary: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

political_items.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to truce for Orthodox Easter
political_items.summary: Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon on 11 April through Easter Sunday.
